yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Microsoft_Security_Advisory_CVE202642899 {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-42899 – ASP.NET Core Denial of Service Vuln"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-18"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-42899" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Microsoft Security Advisory CVE-2026-42899 – ASP.NET Core De"; content:"CVE-2026-42899"; nocase; sid:6704334; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
